| Date | Topics | Slides etc | Assignment Due |
|------|---------|------------|--------------|
| Tue, Mar 18 | Portfolio optimization | [Course intro](day1-intro.pdf){target="_blank"} <br>[Portfolio optimization](day1-meanvariance.pdf){target="_blank"}<br>[Excel Sharpe Ratio Example](Topic5.1_SharpeRatioExamples_Revised.xlsx){target="_blank"}| |
| Thur, Mar 20 | Simulation and forecasting |[Simulation and forecasting](day2-simulation.pdf){target="_blank"} | 1. Portfolio optimization|
| Tue, Mar 25 | Cost of equity capital | [Cost of equity](day3-costofequity.pdf){target="_blank"}| |
| Thur, Mar 27 | Fama-French model| | 2. Simulation|
| Tue, Apr 1 | Attribution analysis | | |
| Thur, Apr 3 | Financial ratios | | 3. Attribution analysis|
| Tue, Apr 8 | Capital budgeting | | |
| Thur, Apr 10 | Capital budgeting | | 4. Financial ratios|
| Tue, Apr 15 | Valuation | | | 
| Thur, Apr 17 | Options | | 5. Capital budgeting|
| Tue, Apr 22 | Intro to machine learning| | |
| Thur, Apr 24 | Applications of machine learning| | 6. Valuation|

Each assignment is a group assignment.  The details are on Canvas.  Upload a link to a Julius workflow for each assignment.
